case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. URUBIEL HERNANDEZ LOBATOS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-03-2017 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LOBATOS, URUBIEL HERNANDEZ
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $65.00 SERVED SEP-16-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LOBATOS, URUBIEL HERNANDEZ

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-03-2017 - APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, AFTER MATTER WAS HEARD, THE COURT TAKEN THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-03-2017 BY JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED. NO EXHIBITS DETAINED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOBATOS, URUBIEL HERNANDEZ $1,321.01 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,416.01 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,321.01 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LOBATOS, URUBIEL HERNANDEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-03-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
